title: Qaziuy Baby Shower Banner, Burlap Pennant, Yellow, 13 x 17cm, 6m/19.6ft, Perfect for Baby Shower, Christening, Birthday Party Decorations
features: Baby Shower Decorations: You will receive a banner made of linen with "BABY SHOWER" and a love heart printed on it. Perfect for boys girls baby shower Christening birthday party decorations.
Quality Material: Baby shower banners are made of high quality natural burlap, durable and reusable.
Baby Bunting Size: The total length of the baby shower bunting banner is 6m/19.6ft, and each flag measures 13 x 17 cm/ 5.1 x 6.7 inches.

Easy to Use: Baby banners require no assembly and can be hung directly above the party snack, dessert or buffet table, on the tree, on the wall, or used as a photo prop or backdrop for decorating the baby party.
Wide Application: Burlap baby shower bunting is perfect for boys girls baby shower Christening birthday party decorations.
description: Product Description Applicable Scenes Suitable for decorating garden,childen's room,dessert table,outdoor party,indoor party and more.
